title: Uncontrolled Components and Refs
description: Access form values directly from the DOM (brief intro).

slides.title: When You Don't Want to Control 🎛️
Uncontrolled vs Controlled

quizData.question: What attribute do you use to set an initial value in an uncontrolled input?
quizData.explanation: `defaultValue` sets the initial value but does not make the input controlled.
